description: Source file for the main page component of a React-based note-taking frontend, managing notes list, filters, and modals for editing/creating notes.

methods.name: fetchNotes
methods.description: Fetches notes from API, updates notes state and tags.

methods.name: handleCreateNote
methods.description: Prepares state for creating a new note and opens editor modal.

methods.name: handleEditNote
methods.description: Prepares state for editing existing note and opens editor modal.

methods.name: handleSaveNote
methods.description: Saves a new or updated note via API and refreshes notes list.

methods.name: handleDeleteNote
methods.description: Deletes a note via API and refreshes notes list.
